seo.title: Meet Our Clinical & Leadership Team | Des Moines Wellness Center
seo.description: Meet the board-certified clinicians and leadership behind Des Moines Wellness Center — experienced professionals guiding addiction and dual diagnosis care in Iowa.

hero.headline: Meet Our Team
hero.subhead: Our leadership and clinical team bring years of experience in addiction medicine, nursing, and behavioral health to every patient we serve. Get to know the people guiding your recovery.

image.alt: The compassionate clinical team at Des Moines Wellness Center supporting patients in recovery.

sections.heading: Experienced, Compassionate, Local
body: Des Moines Wellness Center is led by a multidisciplinary team of board-certified clinicians and healthcare professionals with a shared commitment to evidence-based, trauma-informed care. From medical detox to long-term aftercare, our staff bring decades of collective experience to Iowa's recovery community.
Select any team member below to learn more about their background, credentials, and role in your care.

sections.heading: Ready to Speak With Our Team?
body: Our intake specialists are available 24/7 for confidential assessments and insurance verification. Reach out and take the first step toward recovery today.

images.alt: The compassionate clinical team at Des Moines Wellness Center supporting patients in recovery.
